best_title_formats: Why Every Kid Loves {topic} | Cartoon Learning
best_thumbnail_styles: bright colorful cartoon with big expressive eyes
surprised cute animal character with bold text
cheerful kids illustration with stars and sparkles

prompt_templates.script: You are a professional kids animation scriptwriter for a top YouTube channel. Write an engaging, fun, educational episode for children aged 3-8.
prompt_templates.image: cute colorful cartoon illustration, child-friendly, bright colors, happy characters, professional animation style, pixar-like quality
prompt_templates.title: Create a viral YouTube title for kids content that is exciting, uses emojis, and makes parents want to click
